description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a before_script function `nsr` which runs a command and exits on failure. Add a `job01` in the default stage using the `cutecom/cutecom-devel-opensuse` Docker image, executing `nsr ./run-clang-format.py -r .`, then `cmake .` and `make`. Add a `job02` also in the default stage using the `cutecom/cutecom-devel-debian` image, executing `cmake .` and `make`. No caches, artifacts, or rules are specified.
